name: python3-argcomplete
title: python3-argcomplete
summary: bash/zsh tab completion for argparse (for Python 3)
description:
bash/zsh tab completion for argparse (for Python 3)
Argcomplete provides easy, extensible command line tab completion of
arguments for your Python script.
.
It makes two assumptions:
.
* You're using bash or zsh as your shell
* You're using argparse to manage your command line arguments/options
.
Argcomplete is particularly useful if your program has lots of
options or subparsers, and if your program can dynamically suggest
completions for your argument/option values (for example, if the user
is browsing resources over the network).
.
This package provides the module for Python 3.x.

When validating lab setup, run `activate-global-python-argcomplete --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
